site.name: Car Insurance Immigrants
site.tagline: Car Insurance for Immigrants in the US — Every Question Answered
site.description: Free, accurate car insurance information for immigrants in the United States. No SSN, foreign license, ITIN, undocumented — we answer every question in your language.

monetization.cta_text: Compare rates from insurers that work with immigrants

insurers.name: Progressive
insurers.notes: Most immigrant-friendly major insurer. Accepts ITIN in all states.

insurers.name: GEICO
insurers.notes: Accepts ITIN. Foreign license acceptance varies by state.

insurers.name: State Farm
insurers.notes: Accepts ITIN. Local agent discretion on foreign licenses.

insurers.name: Farmers
insurers.notes: Good for immigrants in Western states.

insurers.name: Nationwide
insurers.notes: ITIN accepted, foreign license requirements strict.

insurers.name: Liberty Mutual
insurers.notes: Accepts ITIN. Good rates for new immigrants.

insurers.name: USAA
insurers.notes: Military families only. Not available to most immigrants.

insurers.name: The General
insurers.notes: Specializes in high-risk drivers. Good for immigrants with no US record.

pillars.title: Getting Insured
pillars.description: Everything you need to know about getting car insurance as an immigrant in the US — regardless of your documentation status.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants — Complete Guide
pages.immigrant_angle: The complete guide to getting car insurance in the US as an immigrant — what you need, what you don't need, and how to get covered today regardless of status.

pages.title: Car Insurance Without a Social Security Number
pages.immigrant_angle: Exact steps to get car insurance using ITIN instead of SSN. Which major insurers accept ITIN, what documents you need, and how to get covered same day.

pages.title: Car Insurance With an ITIN Number
pages.immigrant_angle: How to use your ITIN (Individual Taxpayer Identification Number) to get car insurance. Every major insurer that accepts ITIN with their specific requirements.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Foreign Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Which US insurers accept foreign licenses, how long your foreign license is valid, and what to do when it expires. State-by-state breakdown.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Undocumented Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Undocumented immigrants can legally get car insurance in all 50 states. Which insurers, which documents, and whether it is safe — complete honest guide.

pages.title: Car Insurance With No US Credit History
pages.immigrant_angle: New immigrants have no US credit history — how this affects rates, which insurers look past it, and how to build credit to lower your premium.

pages.title: Car Insurance for New Immigrants — Just Arrived Guide
pages.immigrant_angle: Step-by-step car insurance guide for immigrants who just arrived in the US. What you need on day 1, week 1, and month 1.

pages.title: Same Day Car Insurance for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: How to get car insurance the same day you need it as an immigrant — which insurers issue instant proof of insurance and what you need to have ready.

pillars.title: Insurance by Immigration Status
pillars.description: Car insurance requirements and options differ by immigration status. Find your exact situation.

pages.title: Car Insurance by Immigration Status — Find Your Situation
pages.immigrant_angle: Your immigration status affects your insurance options. Find your exact situation — undocumented, DACA, work visa, green card, asylum, TPS.

pages.title: Car Insurance for DACA Recipients
pages.immigrant_angle: DACA recipients have EADs and SSNs — making insurance easier than for undocumented. Complete guide to the best rates and coverage for Dreamers.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Green Card Holders
pages.immigrant_angle: Green card holders have full access to all insurance options. How to get the best rates, use your foreign driving record, and build US insurance history.

pages.title: Car Insurance on a Work Visa (H1B, L1, O1)
pages.immigrant_angle: H1B, L1, O1 and other work visa holders — how to get insurance immediately on arrival, transfer your foreign driving record, and what happens when your visa expires.

pages.title: Car Insurance for International Students (F1, J1)
pages.immigrant_angle: F1 and J1 student visa holders — cheapest car insurance options, using your home country license, and student discounts you qualify for.

pages.title: Car Insurance for TPS Holders
pages.immigrant_angle: Temporary Protected Status holders have work authorization and can get full car insurance. Which documents to use and best insurer options.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Asylum Seekers and Refugees
pages.immigrant_angle: Asylum seekers and refugees — what documents to use before you have SSN, which states have special programs, and how to get insured while your case is pending.

pillars.title: Common Questions
pillars.description: The questions every immigrant asks about car insurance in the US — answered directly, honestly, in your language.

pages.title: Car Insurance Questions for Immigrants — All Answered
pages.immigrant_angle: Every question immigrants have about car insurance in the US — the ones nobody else answers honestly.

pages.title: Can I Get Car Insurance if I'm Undocumented?
pages.immigrant_angle: Direct honest answer: yes, undocumented immigrants can get car insurance in all 50 states. Which insurers, which documents, is it safe, and what are your rights.

pages.title: Will My Car Insurance Company Report Me to ICE?
pages.immigrant_angle: The most feared question — answered with legal citations. Insurance companies are not immigration enforcement. What the law says, what they can share, and your privacy rights.

pages.title: Is It Safe to Buy Car Insurance as an Undocumented Immigrant?
pages.immigrant_angle: Privacy laws, what information insurers collect, what they cannot share with ICE, and why having insurance is safer than not having it.

pages.title: What Happens if I Get in an Accident Without Insurance as an Immigrant?
pages.immigrant_angle: The legal and immigration consequences of an accident without insurance — honest breakdown by state, what police do, what courts do, and whether it affects your status.

pages.title: Can a Car Accident Affect My Immigration Status?
pages.immigrant_angle: When a car accident can and cannot affect your immigration status — DUI, no insurance, no license, and fleeing the scene each carry different immigration consequences.

pages.title: Can I Use My Mexican License for Car Insurance in Texas?
pages.immigrant_angle: Texas-specific guide for Mexican license holders — which insurers accept it, how long it is valid, when you must get a Texas license, and average rates.

pages.title: Does GEICO Require a Social Security Number?
pages.immigrant_angle: Exact answer on GEICO SSN requirements — ITIN acceptance, what to say when applying, and how to get a quote without an SSN.

pages.title: Can I Get Car Insurance the Same Day I Arrive in the US?
pages.immigrant_angle: Yes — and here is exactly how. Which insurers give same-day coverage, what documents to bring, and how to get proof of insurance within hours of arrival.

pages.title: What Is an ITIN and Can I Use It for Car Insurance?
pages.immigrant_angle: Complete explanation of ITIN for car insurance — what it is, how to get one from the IRS, which insurers accept it, and how to use it when applying.

pages.title: How Do I Get Car Insurance With No US Credit History?
pages.immigrant_angle: New immigrants have zero US credit history — how this affects premiums, which insurers do not use credit score, and how to get fair rates anyway.

pages.title: What Happens to My Car Insurance if I'm Deported?
pages.immigrant_angle: What happens to your policy, your car, your refund, and your family if you are deported — and how to plan ahead so your family is protected.

pages.title: Can a Family Member Insure a Car in My Name?
pages.immigrant_angle: When a family member can and cannot insure a car for you — named insured vs listed driver, what is legal, and how to handle shared family vehicles.

pages.title: Does Car Insurance Check Immigration Status?
pages.immigrant_angle: Exactly what car insurance companies check when you apply — and what they do not check. Immigration status is not a standard part of the insurance application.

pillars.title: Foreign License Insurance
pillars.description: Using your home country driver's license for car insurance in the US — by country and by state.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Foreign Driver's License — Complete Guide
pages.immigrant_angle: Which US insurers accept foreign licenses, how long they are valid, and what to do when your foreign license expires.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Mexican Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Mexican license holders — the most common situation in the US. Which insurers accept it, how long it is valid in each state, and when you must convert.

pages.title: Car Insurance With an Indian Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Indian license holders on H1B, L1, or other visas — insurance options, IDP requirements, and how to transfer your Indian driving record for better rates.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Philippine Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Filipino immigrants — insurance with Philippine license, states with best options, and how to convert your license quickly.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Chinese Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Chinese license holders face unique challenges — Chinese licenses are not recognized in most states for driving but can still affect insurance rates.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Brazilian Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Brazilian immigrants in Florida and Massachusetts — insurance options, Mercosur license reciprocity, and how to get covered quickly.

pages.title: Car Insurance With a Korean Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Korean license holders — South Korea has reciprocity agreements with some US states. How to use your Korean driving record to get lower rates.

pillars.title: After an Accident
pillars.description: What to do after a car accident as an immigrant — with or without insurance, with or without a license.

pages.title: Car Accident as an Immigrant — What to Do
pages.immigrant_angle: Step-by-step guide for immigrants after a car accident — what to say, what not to say, what police can and cannot do, and how to protect your rights.

pages.title: Car Accident Without Insurance — Immigrant Guide
pages.immigrant_angle: The legal consequences of an accident without insurance as an immigrant — state fines, license suspension, civil liability, and immigration impact.

pages.title: Car Accident Without a License — Immigrant Rights
pages.immigrant_angle: Driving without a license is a serious charge — but it does not automatically mean deportation. What happens, what your rights are, and how to handle it.

pages.title: Car Accident With No English — What to Do
pages.immigrant_angle: Your right to an interpreter after an accident. What to say to police, what to say to the other driver, and key phrases in English every immigrant should know.

pages.title: Hit by an Uninsured Driver as an Immigrant
pages.immigrant_angle: What to do when the other driver has no insurance — your options as an immigrant, uninsured motorist coverage, and how to get compensation.

pages.title: SR-22 Insurance for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: What SR-22 is, when immigrants need it, which insurers offer it without SSN, and how much it costs — by state.

pillars.title: Coverage Explained
pillars.description: US car insurance coverage types explained simply for immigrants — what you must have, what is optional, and what actually protects you.

pages.title: Car Insurance Coverage Explained for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: US car insurance is different from most countries. Plain-language explanation of every coverage type and what immigrants actually need.

pages.title: Liability Car Insurance — What It Means for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Liability insurance is required in almost every state. What it covers, what it does not, and why the minimum is rarely enough.

pages.title: Full Coverage Car Insurance for Immigrants — Is It Worth It?
pages.immigrant_angle: What full coverage actually means, when you need it, and whether it is worth the extra cost for immigrants — especially those with older cars.

pages.title: Minimum Car Insurance Requirements by State — 2025
pages.immigrant_angle: Every state has different minimum insurance requirements. Complete table of minimums, average costs, and which states are strictest about enforcement.

pages.title: Uninsured Motorist Coverage — Essential for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Uninsured motorist coverage protects you when the other driver has no insurance — critically important in states with high uninsured rates.

pillars.title: Insurance Companies
pillars.description: Which car insurance companies work best for immigrants — who accepts ITIN, who accepts foreign licenses, and who has the best rates.

pages.title: Best Car Insurance Companies for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Ranked comparison of every major US insurer for immigrants — ITIN acceptance, foreign license policy, rates for new immigrants, and which to avoid.

pages.title: Car Insurance Companies That Accept ITIN — Full List
pages.immigrant_angle: The definitive list of US car insurance companies that accept ITIN instead of SSN — with specific requirements, notes, and how to apply at each one.

pillars.title: Driver's License Guide
pillars.description: Getting a driver's license as an immigrant — which states allow it, how to convert your foreign license, and how it affects your insurance.

pages.title: Driver's License for Immigrants — Complete US Guide
pages.immigrant_angle: Getting a driver's license as an immigrant in the US — which states issue licenses regardless of immigration status, what documents you need, and how it affects insurance.

pages.title: States That Issue Driver's Licenses Without SSN — 2025
pages.immigrant_angle: 19 states and DC issue driver's licenses regardless of immigration status. Complete list with requirements, documents needed, and how this affects your insurance options.

pages.title: How Long Is a Foreign Driver's License Valid in the US?
pages.immigrant_angle: State-by-state breakdown of how long you can drive on a foreign license, when you must get a US license, and how to use an International Driving Permit.

pages.title: International Driving Permit (IDP) and Car Insurance
pages.immigrant_angle: What an IDP is, where to get one, which states require it vs just a foreign license, and whether it helps you get car insurance.

pages.title: How to Convert a Foreign License to a US Driver's License
pages.immigrant_angle: Step-by-step guide to converting your foreign license — which states have reciprocity, which require a full driving test, and how conversion lowers your insurance rates.

pillars.title: By State
pillars.description: Car insurance for immigrants in every US state — minimums, ITIN acceptance, license rules, and average rates.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants by State
pages.immigrant_angle: Car insurance rules for immigrants vary dramatically by state. Find your state for specific requirements, which insurers operate there, and average rates.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in California
pages.immigrant_angle: California is the most immigrant-friendly state — AB 60 licenses, ITIN accepted by all major insurers, and the largest immigrant population in the US.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Texas
pages.immigrant_angle: Texas requires SSN for a state license but ITIN is accepted by most insurers. Large Mexican and Central American immigrant community with specific options.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Florida
pages.immigrant_angle: Florida has a large Cuban, Venezuelan, Colombian, and Brazilian immigrant community. No-fault insurance state with specific rules immigrants must understand.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in New York
pages.immigrant_angle: New York issues licenses regardless of immigration status since 2019. No-fault state with high minimums — complete guide for immigrants.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Illinois
pages.immigrant_angle: Illinois issues TVDL licenses for immigrants and has a large Polish, Mexican, and Indian immigrant community. Full guide to insurance options.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in New Jersey
pages.immigrant_angle: New Jersey has one of the highest car insurance rates in the US. How immigrants can get covered at reasonable rates with ITIN or foreign license.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Arizona
pages.immigrant_angle: Arizona has a large Mexican immigrant community. SSN required for AZ license, but ITIN accepted by most insurers. Full guide.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Georgia
pages.immigrant_angle: Georgia has a rapidly growing immigrant population, especially in Atlanta. Insurance options for immigrants with ITIN or foreign license.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in Washington State
pages.immigrant_angle: Washington issues licenses regardless of status. Large Asian immigrant community. Full guide to insurance options.

pages.title: Car Insurance for Immigrants in North Carolina
pages.immigrant_angle: North Carolina has a growing Mexican and Central American community. Insurance options with ITIN and foreign license.

pillars.title: Save Money on Insurance
pillars.description: How immigrants can get the lowest possible car insurance rates — discounts, comparison strategies, and money-saving tips.

pages.title: How Immigrants Can Save Money on Car Insurance
pages.immigrant_angle: Immigrants often overpay for car insurance because they don't know their options. Every money-saving strategy that works without US credit history or SSN.

pages.title: How to Compare Car Insurance Quotes as an Immigrant
pages.immigrant_angle: Step-by-step guide to comparing quotes as an immigrant — what information to have ready, which comparison sites work without SSN, and how to evaluate offers.

pages.title: Car Insurance Discounts for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Every car insurance discount immigrants can qualify for — good driver, multi-car, telematics, pay-in-full, and how to ask for them.

pages.title: Pay-Per-Mile Car Insurance for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: Pay-per-mile insurance (Metromile, Milewise) can save immigrants who don't drive much up to 50%. How it works, who offers it, and whether ITIN is accepted.

pages.title: Non-Owner Car Insurance for Immigrants
pages.immigrant_angle: If you don't own a car but drive borrowed or rental cars — non-owner insurance is cheap and builds your US insurance history.
